svg.title: State of the system at each step of checkpoint and restore
svg.desc: Five panels show how the contents of GPU, CPU, and Disk change as cuda-checkpoint and CRIU run, then run in reverse on the restore side. Color is preserved as contents move: GPU-origin contents stay blue, CPU-origin contents stay teal, so you can track where each piece of state lives at every step.
svg.text: GPU state copied into host memory; GPU bucket emptied
CPU state (now containing the serialized GPU state) written to disk
Restore — the same steps run in reverse, possibly on a different node
Checkpoint image read from disk into CPU memory
Serialized GPU state copied from CPU memory back onto the GPU
